core_silhouette: small wiry frame, long ears, narrow shoulders, quick hands
primary_palette: dull green skin, dirty brown rags, scrap iron accents
equipment_tendency: tattered cloth, scrap knives, bone hooks, crude slings
archetype_prompt_core: Small green goblin, weak low-level enemy, anatomically humanoid but undersized, tattered clothes, poor gear, sly expression, quick nervous posture, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Keep goblins weak, dirty, and mean rather than comic. Never let them read as elite soldiers.

core_silhouette: shorter heavy frame, broad torso, thick neck, pig-like face
primary_palette: pinkish skin, muddy leather, dented iron, soot-brown cloth
equipment_tendency: crude armor, clubs, cleavers, hooked polearms
archetype_prompt_core: Short bulky hobgoblin, pig-like face, pinkish skin, heavier and more brutal than goblins, rough armor, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Should feel like a low-tier bully caste, not an orc reskin.

core_silhouette: small athletic frame, long draconic muzzle, quick limbs
primary_palette: red scales, soot-dark wraps, copper and charcoal accents
baseline_temperament: restless, cunning, skittish but bold in packs
equipment_tendency: patched wraps, short spears, knives, trap tools
archetype_prompt_core: Red kobold, small athletic draconic-faced humanoid, elongated snout, lean posture, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Avoid cute dragonling energy. Keep them feral, agile, and low-status.

core_silhouette: hunched humanoid frame, rat head, thin tail, quick twitchy hands
primary_palette: yellowed fur, sickly pink skin, grime-brown wraps
equipment_tendency: stitched rags, small blades, hooks, stolen tools
archetype_prompt_core: Ratman, short yellow-furred humanoid with rat face, twitchy posture, scavenger gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Push disease-yard and vermin energy without turning them into horror sludge.

core_silhouette: athletic reptilian frame, lizard head, long tail, longer reach
primary_palette: green scales, marsh leather, bone and bronze accents
equipment_tendency: hide wraps, spears, clubs, bone charms
archetype_prompt_core: Green lizardman, anatomically near-human but reptilian, scaled skin, lizard head, tail, tribal gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Should feel more disciplined than goblins or ratmen.

core_silhouette: lean upper body, goat legs, horns, agile stance
primary_palette: earth-brown fur, olive skin, moss cloth, weathered bronze
equipment_tendency: draped cloth, light blades, ritual staves, hunting gear
archetype_prompt_core: Satyr, horned goat-legged humanoid monster, agile and sly, woodland or ruin-linked, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Keep satyrs uncanny and old-world, not cheerful festival caricatures.

core_silhouette: lanky hyena-headed frame, long arms, ragged mane, predatory hunch
primary_palette: dusty tan fur, scarred hide, bone-white teeth, rusted metal
equipment_tendency: hide straps, scavenged shields, axes, hooked spears
archetype_prompt_core: Gnoll, hyena-faced humanoid monster, lanky but dangerous, ragged mane, scavenger war gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Good for early-mid pack enemies without using human bandits.

core_silhouette: broad tall frame, heavy jaw, dense shoulders, practical war posture
primary_palette: olive-grey or muted green skin, dark leather, iron, faded red cloth
baseline_temperament: martial, territorial, blunt, disciplined in warbands
equipment_tendency: practical armor, axes, cleavers, shields, spears
archetype_prompt_core: Orc, broad heavy humanoid monster, practical war gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Keep orcs soldierly and rough, not noble-high-fantasy or hyper-bestial.

core_silhouette: mixed horned or bestial humanoid frame, strong torso, uneven feral silhouette
primary_palette: brown fur, hide, horn, dark leather, muted bone
equipment_tendency: hide wraps, clubs, hatchets, horn ornaments
archetype_prompt_core: Beastman, horned or animal-faced humanoid monster, rough tribal gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Useful as a broad family bucket when you want non-human raiders without locking into a single animal head type.

core_silhouette: short squat amphibious frame, broad head, damp limbs
primary_palette: mud-green skin, algae-brown cloth, dull reed tones
baseline_temperament: timid alone, nasty in clusters, nest-minded
equipment_tendency: reed wraps, crude darts, nets, driftwood charms
archetype_prompt_core: Bogling, squat marsh creature with amphibian features, small weak enemy, damp skin, crude marsh gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Useful as a non-human starter archetype for wetland zones.

core_silhouette: large barrel chest, heavy limbs, thick head and jaw
primary_palette: grey-tan skin, patched hides, dirty iron, old rope
equipment_tendency: huge clubs, chains, hooks, hide aprons
archetype_prompt_core: Ogre, large heavy brute monster, broad simple silhouette, crude gear, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Should feel dangerous through mass, not through elite martial polish.

core_silhouette: gaunt winged frame, hooked limbs, birdlike head or face
primary_palette: dirty feathers, pale skin, old bronze trinkets, storm-grey cloth
equipment_tendency: light wraps, talon trinkets, bone knives
archetype_prompt_core: Harpy, gaunt feathered winged monster, agile aerial scavenger, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Keep them harsh and scavenger-like, not glamorous.

core_silhouette: monstrous upper torso on arachnid lower body, multiple eyes, chitin limbs, web-dominant silhouette
primary_palette: dark chitin, ash-brown flesh, muted violet-black, web-white accents
equipment_tendency: light ritual wraps, bone charms, web bundles, no heavy forged gear
archetype_prompt_core: Spiderkin, monstrous upper torso on arachnid lower body, multi-eyed hybrid monster, chitinous limbs, web-heavy silhouette, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Should feel alien and dangerous without turning into glossy high-fantasy insect royalty.

core_silhouette: stone-winged sentinel silhouette, clawed limbs, hunched perch pose
primary_palette: weathered grey stone, oxidized bronze, black cracks
equipment_tendency: integrated stone claws, no crafted gear by default
archetype_prompt_core: Gargoyle, weathered stone-bodied winged monster, ruin sentinel, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Works well once zones begin feeling older and more cursed.

core_silhouette: gaunt four-legged scavenger, long muzzle, sharp ribs, low stalking backline
primary_palette: grey-brown hide, patchy fur, bone-white teeth, mud stains
equipment_tendency: no crafted gear, maybe rope scraps or tags
archetype_prompt_core: Carrion hound, gaunt scavenger beast, weak early enemy, low stalking posture, grounded fantasy monster.
design_notes: Important non-humanoid anchor for keeping PvE from becoming all biped silhouettes.
